results.rendered_html:
yāvana a. (nī f.) [yabana-aṇ, yuṇic lyu vā] Belonging to the Yavanas; na vade dyāvanīṃ bhāṣāṃ prāṇaiḥ kaṃṭhagatairapi  Subhāṣ. 
— naḥ Incense.
— naṃ Mixing, mingling.
